title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Future Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Future Retail
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
